summary: Bundle truncation hides a material review signal, so the wrapper needs missing evidence and a revised claim before reuse.

findings.title: Bundle truncation hides material signals
findings.summary: The truncated review bundle omitted a material finding while the wrapper treated the shortened packet as complete.
findings.recommendation: Collect the missing bundle segment and revise the artifact before relying on the review signal summary.
